---
title: "Global Sustainable Energy Trends (2000–2020)"
author:
- Shakshi Shah
- Annamalai Vikash Raam Manoj
- Siyuan Yin
- Xuanning Zhang
date: last-modified

format:
html:
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
code-fold: true
code-tools: true
smooth-scroll: true
theme: cosmo

execute:
echo: false
warning: false
message: false

editor: visual
---

# Executive Summary

# Introduction

# Methodology

# Results

# Discussion and Recommendations

# References
